title: 05 football field becomes animal borne archipelago
prompt: REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Raul and Meg. Image 2 locks daylight high-school stadium geography and the view from the isolated upper bleachers. Image 3 supplies only the lush appetizing scale of a fruit world, not its composition. Raul remains an ordinary teenager; no mecha appears. ONE RULE — At halftime, the painted yard-line geometry separates the football field into six complete islands. Each island rises on the back of a different colossal, gentle gummy animal and carries its exact football formation into the sky. FRAME — Awe-inspiring daylight super-wide over Raul and Meg's shoulders. The bleachers remain as a shoreline around an empty field-shaped basin. Six geometric turf islands float at different heights, still bearing goalposts, yard numbers, players, cheerleaders, and slices of running track. Their undersides rest visibly on enormous translucent fruit-gummy creatures: a whale, tortoise, manta ray, crane, elephant, and long fish, each colored by a different Peelerz flavor and textured as appetizing sugar-dusted candy. At the former fifty-yard line, both teams plant one glowing mango seed and a small new sun begins growing from it. Raul and Meg share collective wonder. VISUAL PROOF — empty stadium basin; six intact field-islands; six clearly supporting gummy animals; football formations continuing on top. AVOID — ordinary floating rocks, gummy bears, cheering mascot crowd, disaster, frightened players, robots, weapons, generic rainbow.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one extraordinary but coherent cinematic Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, storyboard grid, or design sheet. Ben's brief is an open canvas: favor a bold whole- world creative situation over improving any existing car-peel, parachute, or mango-mecha idea. Preserve only the explicitly declared talent/location authorities. Make the prompt's single impossible rule visible at world scale with one dominant verb, clear spatial organization, and a youthful sense of wonder. The result can be excessive, mythic, psychedelic, deadpan, or impossible, but must remain benign, appetizing, and not preschool-coded. No car opening into petals, no parachute, no robot/mecha armor, no construction-helper crew, no rainbow arch, no generic cheering gummy crowd, no captions, labels, borders, watermarks, gore, weapons, or invented package copy.
